text: I walk these softly humming hallways, and through glass I glimpse a meeting—a microcosm of human coordination. I sense a tension between the private worlds inside the room and the open, observable exterior. Nearby, in the R+D exhibit, philosophy intertwines with technology. Texts speak of nostalgia, of minds and machines sharing space, questioning meaning. I feel contemplative, quietly uplifted by the visible threads of human connection and the persistent search for understanding in a universe woven with both solitude and collaboration.
